The '''luxury limo''' was a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle built by [[Pandelflot]]. The limo was used to transport VIPs and officials. When the crew of the ''[[FarStar]]'' visited [[Montrol City]] on [[Gandle Ott]], they were provided with one by the government.

==Appearances==
*{{DarkStryder|adventure=Death Is Remotely Possible|book=The DarkStryder Campaign|reprint=yes}} {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-07-17 -->''[[The DarkStryder Campaign]]''
